name: Singsong Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Singsong Holdings Co., Ltd., through its subsidiaries, produces and sells gluten and starch products in South Korea. It also manufactures and sells soy sauce and soy bean paste; and trades grains, including rice, etc. In addition, it is involved in the catering business through O'coco catering franchise brand; and office rental business. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
